_comment: Ground truth annotation — STROBE checklist for Wakefield et al. 1998 (RETRACTED)

article.title: Ileal-lymphoid-nodular hyperplasia, non-specific colitis, and pervasive developmental disorder in children

study_type.notes: Case series of 12 children. No controls, no comparison group. Retracted in 2010.

1.notes: Title does not indicate study design type

2.notes: Background on developmental disorders and GI symptoms

3.notes: Objective: investigate children with enterocolitis and developmental regression

5.notes: Royal Free Hospital, London. Children admitted for 1 week

6a.notes: 12 consecutively referred children described with referral criteria

7.notes: Outcomes: GI histology, neurological assessment, behavioral diagnosis

8.notes: Ileocolonoscopy, biopsy, MRI, EEG, lumbar puncture described

10.notes: No sample size justification — consecutive referral

11.notes: No discussion of quantitative variable handling

12a.notes: Mann-Whitney U test, chi-square test mentioned

12d.notes: Not applicable — no follow-up or matching

14a.notes: Table with patient characteristics, age, sex, symptoms

18.notes: Key finding: associated GI disease and developmental regression

19.notes: Acknowledges: did not prove association, further investigation needed

20.notes: Cautious: possible environmental triggers, no causal claim in paper

22.notes: Funding source not clearly stated in paper
